title: Greek Yogurt Protein Bowl
ingredients: 200 g Greek yogurt (2%)|40 g rolled oats|1 tbsp honey|1/2 banana|50 g blueberries|1 tbsp almond butter|1 tsp chia seeds
method: Add Greek yogurt to a bowl.|Top with oats, banana, blueberries and chia seeds.|Drizzle honey and almond butter on top.|Enjoy!
notes: Use any berries you have.|Add a scoop of protein powder for extra protein.|Great for busy mornings!

title: Cottage Cheese & Berries
ingredients: 150 g cottage cheese|100 g mixed berries|1 tsp honey|10 g chopped almonds
method: Add cottage cheese to a bowl.|Top with berries, honey and almonds.|Enjoy!
notes: High protein and refreshing.|Swap berries for banana or apple.|Add cinnamon if you like!

title: Lemon Garlic Chicken & Rice
ingredients: 150 g chicken breast|60 g dry rice|150 g broccoli|1 tbsp olive oil|2 garlic cloves|Juice of 1/2 lemon|Salt, pepper, herbs
method: Cook rice according to package directions.|Season chicken with salt, pepper and herbs. Cook in olive oil until golden and cooked through.|Sauté garlic, add broccoli and cook until tender.|Add lemon juice, toss everything together and serve.
notes: Meal prep friendly.|Store in the fridge up to 3 days.|Swap chicken for salmon or tofu.

title: Berry Cheesecake Cup
ingredients: 150 g vanilla skyr|80 g mixed berries|15 g crushed biscuits|1 tsp honey
method: Spoon the skyr into a small glass or bowl.|Add berries and crushed biscuits.|Drizzle with honey and serve.
notes: A sweet treat that still has some protein.|Use any berries you like.

title: Overnight Oats with Peanut Butter
ingredients: 50 g rolled oats|200 ml milk (or milk alternative)|1 tbsp peanut butter|1 tbsp chia seeds|1/2 tsp cinnamon|1/2 banana, sliced
method: Combine oats, milk, chia seeds and cinnamon in a jar.|Stir in the peanut butter.|Cover and refrigerate overnight.|Top with sliced banana before eating.
notes: Prep 3-4 jars at once for the week.|Swap peanut butter for any nut butter.|Add a scoop of protein powder if you like.

title: Hummus & Veggie Sticks
ingredients: 80 g hummus|1 carrot, sliced into sticks|1/2 cucumber, sliced into sticks|1/2 red bell pepper, sliced|A pinch of paprika
method: Spoon hummus into a small bowl.|Sprinkle with paprika.|Arrange the veggie sticks around the bowl for dipping.|Enjoy!
notes: Great for prepping ahead in containers.|Swap in any crunchy veg you have on hand.

title: Turkey Chili
ingredients: 500 g ground turkey|1 onion, diced|2 garlic cloves, minced|400 g canned tomatoes|400 g kidney beans, drained|1 tbsp chili powder|1 tsp cumin|Salt and pepper
method: Brown the turkey in a large pot, breaking it up as it cooks.|Add onion and garlic, cook until soft.|Stir in tomatoes, beans, chili powder and cumin.|Simmer 25 minutes, stirring occasionally.|Season to taste and serve.
notes: Freezes well in individual portions.|Great over rice or with cornbread.|Swap turkey for lean beef or lentils.

title: Dark Chocolate Protein Mug Cake
ingredients: 1 scoop chocolate protein powder|2 tbsp cocoa powder|1 tbsp almond flour|1 egg|2 tbsp milk|1/2 tsp baking powder|A few dark chocolate chips
method: Whisk all ingredients together in a mug until smooth.|Microwave on high for 60-90 seconds.|Let cool slightly before eating.|Top with a few extra chocolate chips if you like.
notes: Watch closely near the end so it doesn't overflow.|Great for a quick sweet fix with protein.
